# Authority Scouting Workflow

## Candidate Sources

Allowed as candidates:

- owned profiles;
- owned project repositories;
- relevant docs;
- relevant awesome lists;
- launch pages;
- editorial guest posts;
- partner/integration docs;
- real community answers.

Blocked:

- link farms;
- PBNs;
- fake reviews;
- comment spam;
- mass profile pages;
- irrelevant directories.

## Required Register Fields

Use:

`$HOME/SKILL/plans/seo-llm-skill-cluster/authority/opportunity-register.schema.yaml`

Every candidate must include:

- target URL;
- proposed anchor;
- relevance score;
- risk score;
- platform rule status;
- approval status;
- external action status.

## Draft Rules

Draft text must:

- answer a real user need;
- mention the link only where useful;
- disclose affiliation when relevant;
- avoid keyword-stuffed anchors;
- avoid fake neutrality.
